# routatic-proxy

> A Go CLI proxy that routes Claude Code requests through multiple upstream providers (OpenCode Go, OpenCode Zen, AWS Bedrock) with automatic model selection and format transformation.

## Project Structure

- `cmd/routatic-proxy/` — CLI entry point (cobra), macOS GUI (darwin-only)
- `internal/handlers/` — HTTP request handling, message parsing, orchestration
- `internal/router/` — Scenario detection, model selection, fallback chains, circuit breaker
- `internal/transformer/` — Anthropic <-> OpenAI/Responses/Gemini format conversion
- `internal/client/` — Upstream HTTP client, provider detection utilities
- `internal/provider/` — Provider-based dispatch (OpenCode Go, Zen, Bedrock)
- `internal/config/` — JSON config loading, hot reload, atomic access
- `internal/models/` — Model classification (endpoint type detection)
- `internal/token/` — Token counting via tiktoken (cl100k_base)
- `internal/daemon/` — Background mode, PID management, autostart
- `internal/gui/` — Embedded HTTP server for webview dashboard (macOS)
- `internal/tray/` — macOS system tray icon and menu
- `internal/history/` — In-memory ring buffer (1000 entries, O(1) insert)
- `internal/metrics/` — In-process request counters
- `pkg/types/` — Polymorphic Anthropic field handling (json.RawMessage accessors)

## Key Concepts

- **Config-driven routing** — All models defined in `~/.config/routatic-proxy/config.json`; adding a model requires no code changes
- **Scenario detection** — Requests analyzed for context (long_context, vision, complex, think, background, default) and routed to optimal model
- **Fallback chains** — If a model fails, automatically tries the next in chain
- **Circuit breaker** — Per-model tracking (3 failures = 30s skip); only 5xx and network failures trigger
- **Wire format transformation** — Anthropic Messages <-> OpenAI Chat Completions / Responses / Gemini
- **Streaming** — Per-byte idle watchdog instead of server-level timeout; heartbeat comments every 3s
- **Polymorphic fields** — `system` and `content` accept both strings and arrays via `json.RawMessage` accessors

## Configuration

- Default location: `~/.config/routatic-proxy/config.json`
- Environment variable interpolation: `${VAR}` supported
- Provider-specific API keys with precedence: `*_API_KEYS` -> `*_API_KEY` -> global `API_KEYS` -> `API_KEY`
- Hot reload available via `hot_reload: true`

Key environment variables:
- `ROUTATIC_PROXY_API_KEY` — Global API key
- `ROUTATIC_PROXY_OPENCODE_GO_API_KEY` — OpenCode Go specific key
- `ROUTATIC_PROXY_OPENCODE_ZEN_API_KEY` — OpenCode Zen specific key
- `ROUTATIC_PROXY_AWS_BEDROCK_API_KEY` — AWS Bedrock specific key

## API

| Endpoint | Format | Description |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| `/v1/messages` | Anthropic | Primary endpoint (Claude Code sends here) |
| `/v1/chat/completions` | OpenAI | Internal routing for most models |
| `/health` | — | Health check |
| `/statusline` | — | Status line for GUI |

GUI API (localhost only):
- `GET /api/metrics` — Request counts, model distribution
- `GET /api/history` — Last 200 request records
- `GET/POST /api/proxy/config` — Full proxy configuration

## Building and Running

```bash
make build   # Build binary to bin/routatic-proxy
make run     # Run without building
make test    # Run tests with race detector
make lint    # go vet + test
make install # Build and install to $GOPATH/bin
```

CLI commands:
```bash
routatic-proxy serve              # Start proxy server
routatic-proxy serve -b           # Start in background
routatic-proxy stop               # Stop running proxy
routatic-proxy status             # Check if running
routatic-proxy init               # Create default config
routatic-proxy validate           # Validate config
routatic-proxy models             # List available models
routatic-proxy update             # Update to latest release
```

## Key Files

- `cmd/routatic-proxy/main.go` — CLI entry point, default config template
- `internal/router/scenarios.go` — Scenario detection patterns and priority
- `internal/router/fallback.go` — Circuit breaker implementation
- `internal/transformer/` — Format conversion (Anthropic <-> OpenAI/Responses/Gemini)
- `internal/models/classifier.go` — `ClassifyEndpoint()` for wire format detection
- `configs/config.example.json` — Reference config with all options
